final_prompt.prompt:
Create a concept art illustration of futuristic architecture (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "未来主义" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Zaha Hadid parametric architecture, Syd Mead (Blade Runner concept art), 2000s eco-futurism illustration; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include a streamlined white building floating in the air as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: must include drones, holographic projections, and clean energy facilities surrounding the architecture
Lighting/mood: needs a sustainable urban vision atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
